antidea.name: ANTIDEA
antidea.descriptionText: Antidea is an association of photographers and videomakers that create documentaries on social and environmental topics. I developed a fully custom website for them to showcase their documentaries and activities. The site was built with React and a CMS is being implemented for autonomous content management.

iron-jiu-jitsu.name: IRON JIU JITSU
iron-jiu-jitsu.descriptionText: For Iron Jiu Jitsu, I developed a team management software with a frontend in React and Vite.js, and a backend in Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. The software allows managing athlete registrations, their insurance and medical certificates, subscriptions, and deadlines with an automated messaging system via WhatsApp API. A financial history feature is currently being implemented.

modi.name: MODì
modi.descriptionText: Modì is the Web App I developed as a Capstone Project for the EPICODE Web Development course. The project was selected among the best capstones presented and is a web application that allows both the creation of thematic museum guides and the ability to search and listen to the guides during a museum visit.
